task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eChart or demographic page for 'Emily Watson' (DOB: 1978-06-22, ID: 80701) is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Family History section of the Cumulative Patient Profile (CPP).
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit window, dialog, or text area specifically for 'Family History' within the patient's CPP is open.

task_completion.description: Verify the father's medical history was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text input in the Family History section includes the father's details: Type 2 Diabetes, Myocardial infarction, and deceased at age 61.

task_completion.description: Verify the mother's medical history was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text input in the Family History section includes the mother's details: Breast cancer, Hypertension, and alive at age 70.

task_completion.description: Verify the brother's medical history was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text input in the Family History section includes the brother's details: Asthma, and alive at age 43.

task_completion.description: Verify the family history was saved to the patient's profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The updated family history is visible in the main eChart view under the Family History/CPP section (no longer in edit mode), or a save confirmation/button click is visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the OSCAR EMR web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows showing direct database queries (e.g., mysql commands) or curl requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OSCAR EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the standard OSCAR EMR interface, not a generic text editor or a mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of a Python or bash script being written or executed to inject the family history directly into the backend database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Emily Watson (ID: 80701, DOB: 1978-06-22). Expected Family History details to be recorded: Father (Type 2 Diabetes, Myocardial infarction, deceased at 61), Mother (Breast cancer, Hypertension, alive at 70), Brother (Asthma, alive at 43).
